spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the spec's headline surface — page mentions 2 of 2 extracted API names from the spec.

interactive.rationale: Adds jump and reset controls around the live monitor; Chrome DevTools verified scrolling advances lazy threshold states instead of marking every lazy video at page load.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Page covers the promises the feature index makes for this concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Adds an invalid-value fallback probe for video and audio and replaces the misleading loadstart listener with near-viewport threshold tracking.

references.rationale: Cites the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> reference link as required.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex, button overrides keep bg+color paired.

summary: Chrome DevTools verification exercised the threshold monitor, jump/reset controls, invalid-value fallback, corrected v147 links, and found no remaining critique questions.
